channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Lighting at Kennington Open Space, 6th March
item.description:
None of the lighting from Bolton Crescent to Hillington Street and then around the play park is working. I’d suggest that it is quite unsafe for people coming home from work.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillingdon Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden post broken off on pavement. Trip hazard., 6th March
item.description:
Wooden post broken off on pavement. Trip hazard.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pound Place, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abdoned childs bike, 6th March
item.description:
A children's bike has been left in the play park many days now. It is broken and needs removing.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Footpath From Crossmead To Broad Lawn, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic cones need removing, 6th March
item.description:
The pavement was fixed last week and the four traffic cones need removing.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Footpath From Crossmead To Broad Lawn, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and large items not being removed, 6th March
item.description:
This picture is from AFTER the bin men came and emptied the big bin this morning. There are cardboard boxes that have been there over a week, large items that haven’t been collected, bags full of what looks like building materials I haven’t looked inside and bags of household waste. Maybe your employees should start doing their jobs properly or be held accountable if they’re not. I speak on behalf of myself and my neighbours when I say that is NOT what we want to be looking at when we look out of our windows, or climbing over to get to vehicles. It’s disgusting and clearly nobody is responsible enough to organise getting it cleared away. What to the men who are supposed to keep the close clean do during the day? They’re always outside speaking loud on their phones but they haven’t used their common sense to contact the relevant department to sort out this issue if it isn’t their specific role?!? Let’s be serious.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wivenhoe Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light on road is out, 6th March
item.description:
Street light on road is out, not coming on at night.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Grove, Hackney, London

item.title: Street light out at night, 6th March
item.description:
Street light for the car park is broken, not coming on at night.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Grove, Hackney, London

item.title: Deep pothole, 6th March
item.description:
Outside number 189 Farnaby Road. There are a few along that stretch towards the golf club.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farnaby Road, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Dumped Rubbish, 6th March
item.description:
Dumped rubbish on the corner of Rookery Drive & Old Hill, Chislehurst

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Hill, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain outside Cranley The Green STILL blocked, 6th March
item.description:
You have closed my report of a locked drain which someone thinks they have repaired but if you look at the first photo you can see that the rain is still not draining away. Please could this drain be correctly unblocked so that cars do not drench passers by when they drive through the puddle,which they need to do due to the narrow road here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Green, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large deep pothole, 6th March
item.description:
Dangerous pothole in road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 55, Downs Hill, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two wide deep potholes outside 79 - 81, 6th March
item.description:
Two large deep potholes - saw a cyclist come off his bike.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Downs Hill, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple dog fouling on the pavement outside our house, 6th March
item.description:
For a few months the r problem seems to be getting worse. There is large dog poos on the pavement at least everyday. We have a child and so does the house next door and it is dangerous and disgusting.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charldane Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on path, 6th March
item.description:
Dumped boxes and wooden unit on the path

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Darenth Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp post blocking access to my drive, 6th March
item.description:
Hello, The lampost in front of my house is obstructing access into my drive. When we first moved here the lampost was in a position that allowed me to access my drive without issue but since then it has been moved three times, (without prior warning or notification). On the final time, it blocked off over a foot off the end of my drive which has caused a massive inconvenience as the pavement is extremely high. I have brought this issue up with highways and i am not satisfied with the response. Please resolve this issue as soon as possible and send over a complaints reference number. Kind regards Coral Miles

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 145, Orchard Rise West, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 6th March
item.description:
Abandoned vehicle. No tax or MOT. Flat tyre suggests it is abandoned.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pullman Place, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Whole side of road flooded by crayford arrows football ground, 6th March
item.description:
Road carriageway on football club side flooded so have to drive on wrong side of road to avoid as so deep
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raised paving slab trip hazard., 6th March
item.description:
My wife fell here on Tuesday 3rd March 2026 due to this raised paving slab causing her to cut her mouth and chin, damaging her front teeth requiring dental treatment and badly grazing her hands and right knee requiring treatment at the urgent care centre at Beckenham Beacon.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackbrook Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several potholes approx. 10cm deep next to patch repairs, 6th March
item.description:
There are several potholes along the stretch of road at the top of Buckingham Avenue where all the parked cars make the road very narrow. They are all next to a recently patched part of tarmac and are difficult to avoid due to the parked cars.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Buckingham Avenue, Whetstone, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peacock Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
